use_cases.user_question: What are the top 5 product categories by total revenue?
use_cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    p.product_category_name as category,
    ROUND(SUM(pay.payment_value), 2) as total_revenue
FROM olist_products_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON p.product_id = i.product_id
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_payments_dataset pay ON o.order_id = pay.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' -- Only include completed orders
GROUP BY p.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;
use_cases.sql_used:
SELECT 
    p.product_category_name as category,
    ROUND(SUM(pay.payment_value), 2) as total_revenue
FROM olist_products_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON p.product_id = i.product_id
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_payments_dataset pay ON o.order_id = pay.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' -- Only include completed orders
GROUP BY p.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

use_cases.user_question: How many distinct SKUs have been sold till date
use_cases.sql_generated:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) as distinct_skus_sold
FROM olist_order_items_dataset;
use_cases.sql_used:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) as distinct_skus_sold
FROM olist_order_items_dataset;

use_cases.user_question: What are the top 10 product categories by total revenue?
use_cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    p.product_category_name as category,
    ROUND(SUM(pay.payment_value), 2) as total_revenue
FROM olist_products_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON p.product_id = i.product_id
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_payments_dataset pay ON o.order_id = pay.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' -- Only include completed orders
GROUP BY p.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
use_cases.sql_used:
SELECT 
    p.product_category_name as category,
    ROUND(SUM(pay.payment_value), 2) as total_revenue
FROM olist_products_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON p.product_id = i.product_id
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_payments_dataset pay ON o.order_id = pay.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' -- Only include completed orders
GROUP BY p.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

use_cases.user_question: What is the sales growth for the month of Jan 2017?
use_cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    jan_2016.revenue as jan_2016_revenue,
    jan_2017.revenue as jan_2017_revenue,
    ROUND((jan_2017.revenue - jan_2016.revenue) / jan_2016.revenue * 100, 2) as growth_percentage
FROM 
    -- Jan 2016 revenue (prior year)
    (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) as revenue 
     FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p 
     JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id 
     WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable') 
     AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-01') as jan_2016,
    -- Jan 2017 revenue (current year)  
    (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) as revenue 
     FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p 
     JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id 
     WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable') 
     AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-01') as jan_2017
use_cases.sql_used:
SELECT 
    jan_2016.revenue as jan_2016_revenue,
    jan_2017.revenue as jan_2017_revenue,
    ROUND((jan_2017.revenue - jan_2016.revenue) / jan_2016.revenue * 100, 2) as growth_percentage
FROM 
    -- Jan 2016 revenue (prior year)
    (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) as revenue 
     FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p 
     JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id 
     WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable') 
     AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-01') as jan_2016,
    -- Jan 2017 revenue (current year)  
    (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) as revenue 
     FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p 
     JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id 
     WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable') 
     AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-01') as jan_2017

use_cases.user_question: What is the sales growth for the month of December 2017?
use_cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END), 0) as dec_2016_revenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END), 0) as dec_2017_revenue,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    THEN ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END) * 100, 2)
    ELSE NULL 
  END as growth_percentage
FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) IN ('2016-12', '2017-12');
use_cases.sql_used:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END), 0) as dec_2016_revenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END), 0) as dec_2017_revenue,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    THEN ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2016-12' THEN p.payment_value ELSE 0 END) * 100, 2)
    ELSE NULL 
  END as growth_percentage
FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) IN ('2016-12', '2017-12');

use_cases.user_question: What is the sales growth for May 2018?
use_cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    current_revenue,
    prior_revenue,
    ROUND((current_revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue * 100, 2) AS growth_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) 
         FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
         JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
         WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
         AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2018-05') AS current_revenue,
        (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) 
         FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
         JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
         WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
         AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-05') AS prior_revenue
);
use_cases.sql_used:
SELECT 
    current_revenue,
    prior_revenue,
    ROUND((current_revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue * 100, 2) AS growth_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) 
         FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
         JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
         WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
         AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2018-05') AS current_revenue,
        (SELECT SUM(p.payment_value) 
         FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
         JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
         WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
         AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2017-05') AS prior_revenue
);

use_cases.user_question: what are the top 5 product categories by sales in the year 2018?
use_cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    pr.product_category_name AS category,
    ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_sales
FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON o.order_id = i.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_products_dataset pr ON i.product_id = pr.product_id
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
    AND strftime('%Y', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2018'
GROUP BY pr.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 5;
use_cases.sql_used:
SELECT 
    pr.product_category_name AS category,
    ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_sales
FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON o.order_id = i.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_products_dataset pr ON i.product_id = pr.product_id
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')
    AND strftime('%Y', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2018'
GROUP BY pr.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 5;

use_cases.user_question: What are the top 3 product categories by sales in the month of March 2018?
use_cases.sql_generated:
-- Top 3 product categories by sales (revenue) in March 2018
SELECT 
    pr.product_category_name AS category,
    ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_sales
FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON o.order_id = i.order_id  
INNER JOIN olist_products_dataset pr ON i.product_id = pr.product_id
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')  -- Exclude non-completed orders
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2018-03'  -- March 2018 filter
GROUP BY pr.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 3;
use_cases.sql_used:
-- Top 3 product categories by sales (revenue) in March 2018
SELECT 
    pr.product_category_name AS category,
    ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_sales
FROM olist_order_payments_dataset p
INNER JOIN olist_orders_dataset o ON p.order_id = o.order_id
INNER JOIN olist_order_items_dataset i ON o.order_id = i.order_id  
INNER JOIN olist_products_dataset pr ON i.product_id = pr.product_id
WHERE o.order_status NOT IN ('canceled', 'unavailable')  -- Exclude non-completed orders
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_purchase_timestamp) = '2018-03'  -- March 2018 filter
GROUP BY pr.product_category_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 3;
